overall.description: Game engine footage from a maritime simulation showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge during nighttime navigation. The vessel cruises through dark coastal waters while the operator monitors navigation displays including radar and electronic charts.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with forward-facing windows overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar display and navigation charts while maintaining course through coastal waters

entered.detail: array of three navigation displays showing electronic chart, circular radar with rotating sweep, and depth sounder
illuminated forward deck with safety railings and deck lights visible through the bridge windows
dark open water extending to the horizon with gentle wave movement
interior safety railings framing the lower portion of the bridge windows

segments.scene_description: A steady first-person view from a ship's bridge at night, featuring a three-monitor navigation console displaying radar, charts, and depth data. The vessel moves smoothly through dark coastal waters, with the illuminated bow deck visible through the forward windows against the open horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge, capturing a focused navigation sequence through dark coastal waters at night. It begins with a view of a three-monitor console, where the glow of radar, electronic charts, and depth data illuminates the interior. As the camera looks forward, the scene expands through the bridge windows to reveal the illuminated bow deck cutting through the water. The view finally settles on the open horizon, contrasting the bright technical displays of the bridge with the deep shadows of the surrounding sea.
